silver-company.name: Silver Company Mercenaries
silver-company.description: Elite mercenary company known for professionalism and honor. Only takes contracts they deem morally acceptable. Currently contracted to Thornkeep for city defense.
silver-company.resources: Well-equipped with military-grade arms and armor. Maintain a small fortress outside Thornkeep.
silver-company.relationship_with_party: Allied - party has proven themselves in battle alongside the company

crimson-hand.name: The Crimson Hand
crimson-hand.description: Shadowy organization that operates through cells. Known for blood magic rituals and trafficking in forbidden artifacts. Their ultimate goals remain mysterious.
crimson-hand.resources: Extensive criminal network, access to dark magic, infiltrators in multiple cities
crimson-hand.relationship_with_party: Hostile - party has disrupted multiple operations and killed several members
